yt_dlp.h(3) Library Functions Manual yt_dlp.h(3)

NAME

yt_dlp.h - yt-dlp stream URL extraction

SYNOPSIS

Functions


asciichat_error_t yt_dlp_extract_stream_url (const char *url, const char *yt_dlp_options, char *output_url, size_t output_size)
Extract stream URL using yt-dlp with optional parameters. bool yt_dlp_is_available (void)
Check if yt-dlp is installed and accessible.

Detailed Description

yt-dlp stream URL extraction

Encapsulates yt-dlp subprocess logic for extracting playable stream URLs from URLs that yt-dlp supports (YouTube, Twitch, etc.)

Definition in file yt_dlp.h.
